title: bupleurum zoharii
intro: Bupleurum zoharii, also known as Israeli knapweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Apiaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum zoharii are said to include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving liver function, as well as boosting the immune system. Bupleurum zoharii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
